docblock.description: A `ScanEntity` represents a single result of a scan
Magic method, is triggered when invoking inaccessible methods.
docblock.long-description: It calls the same method name from the original `Response` class

docblock.description: This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: Asserts that a global event was not fired. You must track events in your event manager for this assertion to work

tag.name: param
tag.description: Event manager to check, defaults to global event manager

docblock.description: Returns a stub of `Client`, where the `get()` method always returns a response with error (404 status code)
Returns a stub of `Client`, where the `get()` method returns a sample response which is read from `examples/responses` files
Sets the event list and returns the `EventManager` instance
Gets a `Response` instance, writes a new body string and returns.
docblock.long-description: If `$response` is null, a new `Response` instance will be created.

tag.name: param
tag.description: A Response instance or null to create a new instance

docblock.description: This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: This class contains the results of the scan

docblock.long-description: Ensures that each item is a `ScanEntity` and has all the properties it needs
Returns a new `ResultScan` instance as the result of concatenating the list of elements in this collection with the passed list of elements
Returns a new `ResultScan` instance as the result of concatenating the passed list of elements with the list of elements in this collection

docblock.description: This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: A trait intended to make integration tests of your controllers easier
Returns a stub of `Client`, where the `get()` method uses the `IntegrationTestTrait::get()` method and allows you to get responses from the test app
Returns a stub of `LinkScanner` instance, with the `Client::get()` method uses the `IntegrationTestTrait::get()` method and allows you to get responses from the test app
This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.
This class provided methods to be performed as events by `LinkScannerCommand`.

docblock.description: Returns a list of events this object is implementing. When the class is registered in an event manager, each individual method will be associated with the respective event
This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: Instance of `ResultScan`. This contains the results of the scan

property.name: $_defaultConfig
property.default: array('cache' => true, 'excludeLinks' => '/[\{\}+]/', 'externalLinks' => true, 'followRedirects' => false, 'fullBaseUrl' => null, 'maxDepth' => 0, 'lockFile' => true, 'target' => TMP . 'cakephp-link-scanner')

docblock.description: Magic method for reading data from inaccessible properties
Internal method to create a lock file
Internal method to get the absolute path for a filename
Performs a single GET request and returns a `ScanResponse` instance.
docblock.long-description: The response will be cached, if that's ok and the cache is enabled.

tag.name: param
tag.description: The url or path you want to request

docblock.description: Internal method to perform a recursive scan.
docblock.long-description:
It recursively repeats the scan for all urls found that have not already been scanned.
### Events This method will trigger some events: - `LinkScanner.foundLinkToBeScanned`: will be triggered when other links to be scanned are found; - `LinkScanner.responseNotOk`: will be triggered when a single url is scanned and the response is not ok.

docblock.description: Internal method to perform a single scan.
docblock.long-description: ### Events This method will trigger some events: - `LinkScanner.beforeScanUrl`: will be triggered before a single url is scanned; - `LinkScanner.afterScanUrl`: will be triggered after a single url is scanned; - `LinkScanner.foundRedirect`: will be triggered if a redirect is found.

docblock.description: Checks if an url can be scanned.
Returns the string representation of the object
Called during unserialization of the object

docblock.long-description: The filename will be generated automatically, or you can indicate a relative or absolute path. ### Events This method will trigger some events: - `LinkScanner.resultsExported`: will be triggered when the results have been exported.
You can indicate a relative or absolute path. ### Events This method will trigger some events: - `LinkScanner.resultsImported`: will be triggered when the results have been exported.

### Events This method will trigger some events: - `LinkScanner.scanStarted`: will be triggered before the scan starts; - `LinkScanner.scanCompleted`: will be triggered after the scan is finished.
Other events will be triggered by `_recursiveScan()` and `_singleScan()` methods.

tag.name: fluent
tag.description: This method is part of a fluent interface and will return the same instance

docblock.description: This file is part of cakephp-link-scanner.
docblock.long-description: Licensed under The MIT License For full copyright and license information, please see the LICENSE.txt Redistributions of files must retain the above copyright notice.

docblock.description: Hook method invoked by CakePHP when a command is about to be executed

tag.name: return
tag.description: The exit code or null for success

docblock.description: Hook method for defining this command's option parser
